command.title: DCC CLI Command Center
command.meta: Agent control runs through dcc-mcp-cli and the gateway.
agentPrompt.title: Agent handoff prompt
agentPrompt.detail: Copy this before asking an agent to operate a DCC session.
agentPrompt.line.role: You are controlling DCC applications through dcc-mcp-cli.
agentPrompt.line.ensure: Use dcc-mcp-cli first. Commands automatically check and start the gateway when needed.
agentPrompt.line.workflow: Workflow: search for a real tool slug, describe its schema, then call with validated JSON arguments.
agentPrompt.line.skills: For skills and marketplace work, use dcc-mcp-cli load-skill and dcc-mcp-cli marketplace search/install/update.
agentPrompt.line.report: Report the exact command, result status, and any follow-up needed.
section.gatewayDetail: dcc-mcp-cli checks and starts the gateway automatically
section.executeDetail: Search, inspect, then call validated tools
section.extendDetail: Load, install, and update skills from the CLI
section.maintainDetail: Check binary updates through the gateway manifest
cli.ensureDetail: starts the gateway before listing instances
cli.marketplaceInstallDetail: download into the local skill root
cli.updateCheckDetail: compare an instance server version with the update manifest
cli.cliUpdateApplyDetail: download and stage a CLI binary update
aside.skillsDetail: Manage loaded skills and search paths
